title: Error notification
description: Sends an error/alert to Slack with a link back to the run. Secrets come from the environment (SLACK_BOT_TOKEN, SLACK_CHANNEL_ID) — never options. The message and URL fall back to ERROR_MESSAGE / ERROR_URL.

appName.description: Project name shown in the alert, e.g. dev-blog.

message.description: What went wrong. Falls back to ERROR_MESSAGE. Empty means nothing to send.

url.description: Link the 'See the run' button points at. Falls back to ERROR_URL.
